name: slugify
description: Convert any string into a URL-safe slug.
requirements: Handle unicode characters by transliterating to ASCII

name: camel-case
description: Convert strings between camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, and SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE.
requirements: Export toCamel, toPascal, toSnake, toKebab, toScreaming

name: pluralize
description: English pluralization and singularization with irregular word support.
requirements: pluralize(word, count?) returns plural or singular based on count

name: template-engine
description: Minimal template engine with variable interpolation, conditionals, and loops.
requirements: HTML-escape by default, {{{ raw }}} for unescaped output

name: lru-cache
description: LRU cache with optional TTL expiry and max size eviction.
requirements: set(key, value, ttlMs?) and get(key) returning T | undefined

name: priority-queue
description: Binary heap priority queue with generic comparator support.
requirements: push(item) and pop() returning T | undefined
Generic type T with comparator (a: T, b: T) => number
Min-heap by default, max-heap via negated comparator

name: ring-buffer
description: Fixed-capacity circular ring buffer with overwrite-on-full semantics.
requirements: toArray() returns items in insertion order

name: trie-search
description: Prefix trie for fast autocomplete and word lookups.
requirements: insert(word) and search(word) for exact match

name: bloom-filter
description: Probabilistic Bloom filter for fast membership testing with configurable false-positive rate.
requirements: add(item: string) and has(item: string) -> boolean
Uses multiple FNV hash functions internally

name: debounce
description: Debounce and throttle higher-order functions with cancellation support.
requirements: Both return a wrapped function with .cancel() method
debounce returns a promise resolving to the fn's return value
TypeScript generics preserve argument and return types

name: async-pool
description: Limit concurrent async tasks with a promise pool.
requirements: Preserves result order matching input order
Starts new tasks as slots free
allSettled mode option to collect all results

name: retry
description: Retry an async function with configurable backoff strategies.
requirements: retry(fn, options) where options has maxAttempts, delay, backoff ('fixed'|'exponential'|'linear')
retryIf(error) predicate to skip retrying on certain errors
Returns the successful result or throws the last error
jitter option adds randomness to delay

name: timeout-wrap
description: Wrap any promise with a timeout that rejects after a deadline.
requirements: Cleans up the timer on resolution

name: glob-matcher
description: Glob pattern matching for file paths without filesystem access.

name: temp-dir
description: Create and manage temporary directories with automatic cleanup.

name: url-parser
description: Parse and build URLs with query string manipulation.
requirements: parseUrl(url) returns { protocol, host, port, path, query, hash }
buildUrl(parts) assembles a URL from parts

name: hmac-sha256
description: HMAC-SHA256 message authentication using Web Crypto API.
requirements: sign(key: string, message: string) -> Promise<string> (hex output)
Works in Node.js via globalThis.crypto (Node 19+) or require('crypto')

name: uuid-v4
description: RFC 4122 UUID v4 generator using crypto random bytes.

name: base32
description: Base32 encoding and decoding (RFC 4648).
requirements: Support standard alphabet (A-Z 2-7) and hex alphabet

name: hex-codec
description: Efficient hex encoding and decoding for binary data.
requirements: Validate input and throw descriptive errors

name: date-format
description: Date formatting and parsing with pattern strings (no external libs).
requirements: Patterns: YYYY MM DD HH mm ss SSS ddd DDD
relative(date: Date, now?: Date) -> string ('2 hours ago')

name: duration
description: Parse and format human-readable durations (e.g. '2h 30m', '90s').
requirements: Support years, weeks, days, hours, minutes, seconds, ms
add(ms1, ms2) and subtract(ms1, ms2) helpers

name: stats
description: Descriptive statistics for numeric arrays.
requirements: histogram(arr, bins) -> { value: number, count: number }[]

name: moving-average
description: Simple, exponential, and weighted moving averages for time-series data.
requirements: sma(data, period) -> number[] simple moving average
ema(data, period) -> number[] exponential moving average
wma(data, period) -> number[] weighted moving average

name: clamp
description: Math utilities: clamp, lerp, remap, wrap, and smooth-step.
requirements: lerp(a, b, t) -> number linear interpolation
remap(value, inMin, inMax, outMin, outMax) -> number
wrap(value, min, max) -> number wrapping modulo

name: arg-parser
description: Minimal CLI argument parser with typed flags, positional args, and help generation.
requirements: define flags with type ('string'|'boolean'|'number'), default, alias
Unknown flag error with did-you-mean suggestion

name: table-format
description: Format 2D data as an aligned ASCII table for terminal output.

name: ansi-strip
description: Strip ANSI escape sequences from strings.
requirements: strip(str: string) -> string removes all ANSI codes
stripCursor(str) removes only cursor movement codes
visibleLength(str) -> number length without escape codes

name: ansi-colors
description: ANSI color and style codes for terminal output.
requirements: red, green, yellow, blue, cyan, magenta, white, dim, bold, italic
bg.red, bg.green etc for background colors
Detect NO_COLOR env var to disable

name: spinner
description: Terminal spinner with multiple animation styles.
requirements: Spinner class with start(text), stop(), succeed(text), fail(text)
Multiple frames: dots, line, arc, bounce

name: csv-parser
description: Parse and stringify CSV data with RFC 4180 compliance.
requirements: Handle quoted fields with embedded commas and newlines

name: toml-parser
description: Minimal TOML parser for configuration files.
requirements: Support string, integer, float, boolean, datetime, array, table
Inline tables and arrays of tables
Throw ParseError with line number on syntax error

name: frontmatter
description: Parse YAML/TOML frontmatter from Markdown and other text files.
requirements: parse(content: string) -> { data: Record<string, unknown>, body: string }
Zero dependencies - parse YAML subset inline

name: json-path
description: JSONPath expression evaluator for querying nested JSON.
requirements: query(obj, path) -> unknown[] all matching values
get(obj, path) -> unknown | undefined first match
set(obj, path, value) -> void mutates first match

name: markdown-parser
description: Parse Markdown to an AST suitable for rendering or transformation.
requirements: Node types: heading, paragraph, code, blockquote, list, listItem, link, image, bold, italic, inlineCode, hr

name: html-entities
description: HTML entity encoding and decoding.
requirements: decode(str: string) -> string unescapes named and numeric entities
encodeAll(str) -> string encodes all non-ASCII as numeric entities
stripTags(html) -> string removes all HTML tags

name: url-encode
description: URL percent-encoding and decoding utilities.

name: deep-merge
description: Deep merge objects and arrays with configurable conflict resolution.
requirements: Handle null, undefined, Date, RegExp correctly

name: object-diff
description: Compute structural diff between two objects.
requirements: diff(a, b) -> Change[] where Change has path, type ('added'|'removed'|'changed'), oldValue, newValue
invert(changes) reverses a diff for undo

name: object-clone
description: Deep clone objects with support for special types.
requirements: cloneWith(obj, customizer) for special type handling
Handle Date, RegExp, Map, Set, TypedArray, ArrayBuffer
Faster than JSON.parse/stringify for most cases

name: object-freeze-deep
description: Recursively freeze objects to prevent mutation.
requirements: Handle circular references without infinite loop

name: key-value-store
description: In-memory key-value store with namespacing, TTL, and event hooks.
requirements: get(key), set(key, value, ttlMs?), delete(key), has(key)

name: event-bus
description: Typed publish-subscribe event bus.
requirements: once(event, handler) auto-unsubscribes after first call
TypeScript generic EventMap for type-safe events

name: state-machine
description: Finite state machine with typed transitions and guards.
requirements: Define states, events, and transitions declaratively
transition(event) returns new state or throws if invalid
onEnter(state, handler) and onExit(state, handler) hooks
TypeScript generics for state and event unions

name: observable
description: Observable values that notify subscribers on change.
requirements: batch(fn) groups multiple mutations into single notification

name: pipe
description: Functional pipe and compose operators for value transformation.
requirements: TypeScript inference preserves types through the pipeline

name: curry
description: Auto-curry functions of any arity.
requirements: curry(fn) -> curried version accepting partial args
Partial application returns callable with remaining args

name: memoize
description: Memoize pure functions with configurable cache key and size limit.
requirements: keyResolver: (...args) -> string for custom cache key
TypeScript generics preserve argument and return types

name: once
description: Ensure a function is called at most once.
requirements: once(fn) -> fn that only executes on first call
Returns same value on subsequent calls

name: partial
description: Partial application - bind some arguments to a function.

name: result
description: Result/Either monad for type-safe error handling without exceptions.
requirements: unwrap() throws if Err, unwrapOr(default) for safe access

name: option
description: Option/Maybe monad for nullable value handling.

name: linked-list
description: Doubly linked list with O(1) head/tail insert and delete.

name: deque
description: Double-ended queue with O(1) push/pop at both ends.
requirements: popFront() -> T | undefined, popBack() -> T | undefined

name: sparse-array
description: Memory-efficient sparse array for large index ranges.

name: bit-flags
description: Type-safe bit flag utilities for permission/option sets.

name: enum-utils
description: Utilities for working with TypeScript enums and string unions.

name: type-guard
description: Runtime type guards and assertion utilities.
requirements: isString, isNumber, isBoolean, isNull, isUndefined, isArray, isObject

name: schema-validator
description: Runtime JSON schema validator for TypeScript objects.
requirements: validate(schema, value) -> { valid: boolean, errors: string[] }
Schema supports: type, required, properties, items, minimum, maximum, pattern, enum
TypeScript type inference from schema shape

name: natural-sort
description: Natural sort algorithm for strings containing numbers.
requirements: sortBy(arr, key?) sorts strings or objects by string key

name: string-distance
description: String similarity metrics: Levenshtein, Jaro-Winkler, Hamming.

name: fuzzy-match
description: Fuzzy string matching for search and autocomplete.
requirements: match(pattern, str) -> { matched: boolean, score: number, indices: number[] }
highlight(pattern, str) -> { text: string, highlighted: boolean }[]
Algorithm similar to fzf sequential character matching

name: string-builder
description: Efficient string builder for concatenation-heavy operations.
requirements: Dramatically faster than string += for large text

name: rope
description: Rope data structure for efficient large text editing.
requirements: O(log n) operations using balanced binary tree
Suitable for text editor use cases

name: word-wrap
description: Word-wrap text to a maximum line width.
requirements: Handles ANSI escape codes correctly (ignores them for width)
Hard-wrap fallback for words longer than width

name: crc32
description: CRC32 checksum computation for data integrity.
requirements: update(crc: number, data) -> number for streaming

name: fnv-hash
description: FNV-1a hash function for fast non-cryptographic hashing.
requirements: Streaming API: FNV class with update(chunk) and digest()

name: ip-address
description: IPv4 and IPv6 address parsing, validation, and manipulation.

name: mime-type
description: MIME type lookup and file extension mapping.

name: content-type
description: Parse and format HTTP Content-Type headers.
requirements: parse(header: string) -> { type: string, params: Record<string, string> }

name: http-status
description: HTTP status code lookup with categories and messages.
requirements: All standard HTTP codes from 100 to 599

name: semver
description: Semantic versioning parse, compare, and range matching.
requirements: parse(str) -> { major, minor, patch, prerelease, build }

name: topological-sort
description: Topological sort for directed acyclic graphs.
requirements: Throw CycleError with cycle path when cycle detected
Works with any node type via generic + key extractor

name: dag-builder
description: Build and traverse directed acyclic graphs.
requirements: executionOrder() -> string[][] batches of parallel groups

name: interval-tree
description: Interval tree for fast overlap queries.
requirements: insert(start: number, end: number, data: T)
Generic type parameter for associated data

name: binary-search
description: Binary search variants on sorted arrays.
requirements: insertionPoint(arr, target) -> where to insert to keep sorted
Works with any type via comparator function

name: sorted-set
description: Sorted set maintaining insertion order and uniqueness.
requirements: range(min, max) -> T[] values between bounds

name: ordered-map
description: Map that maintains sorted key order.
requirements: keys(), values(), entries() in sorted order
Generic K extends string | number, V

name: multimap
description: Map that associates each key with multiple values.
requirements: delete(key, value?) removes one or all values for key

name: bimap
description: Bidirectional map for one-to-one key-value relationships.

name: weak-ref-cache
description: Cache backed by WeakRef for GC-friendly object caching.
requirements: Uses FinalizationRegistry to clean up stale entries
Suitable for caching computed data associated with DOM nodes or other objects

name: expiring-cache
description: Cache with automatic per-entry TTL expiration.
requirements: set(key, value, ttlMs), get(key) -> T | undefined
Active sweep via prune() to remove stale entries

name: deep-equal
description: Structural equality comparison for any JavaScript value.
requirements: Support primitives, objects, arrays, Date, RegExp, Map, Set
diff(a, b) -> string describing first difference

name: assert
description: Rich assertion library for tests and runtime contracts.
requirements: AssertionError includes actual and expected values

name: mock
description: Function mock and spy utilities for testing.
requirements: spy(obj, method) wraps an existing method
TypeScript generics preserve argument and return types

name: snapshot
description: Snapshot testing utilities for serializing and comparing values.
requirements: matchSnapshot(value, name) compares against stored snapshot
Snapshot stored as JSON file in __snapshots__

name: test-runner
description: Minimal test runner with describe/it/beforeEach/afterEach.
requirements: describe(name, fn), it(name, fn), test(name, fn)
Run tests with run() -> { passed, failed, duration }
Minimal output format: pass/fail with timing

name: fixture-builder
description: Builder pattern for creating test fixture objects.

name: structured-log
description: Structured JSON logger with log levels and context.
requirements: Logger class with debug, info, warn, error methods
Each log outputs JSON: { level, message, timestamp, ...context }
withContext(fields) -> child logger with merged context

name: log-rotate
description: Log rotation for file-based loggers.
requirements: Keep N rotated files, delete older ones

name: env-reader
description: Type-safe environment variable reader with validation.
requirements: Load from process.env and optional .env file
Collect all errors before throwing (no fail-fast)

name: dotenv
description: Parse and load .env files into the environment.
requirements: load(path?) reads .env and merges into process.env
Override mode: existing vars not overwritten by default
Support # comments and multi-line values with quotes

name: path-resolver
description: Project-aware path resolution utilities.
requirements: findProjectRoot(startDir?) -> string by looking for package.json
normalizePath(p) -> forward slashes on all OS

name: file-walker
description: Recursive file system walker with filtering and limiting.
requirements: Options: include (glob patterns), exclude, maxDepth, followSymlinks

name: process-env-reader
description: Safe process.env reader with type coercion and defaults.

name: signal-handler
description: Graceful process signal handling with ordered shutdown.
requirements: Handlers run in priority order with timeout
Exit code preserved from original signal

name: typed-event-emitter
description: Node.js EventEmitter replacement with TypeScript event map types.
requirements: on(event, handler), off(event, handler), emit(event, data)
Fully type-safe - no string-keyed event leakage

name: middleware
description: Compose middleware chains like Koa/Express without the framework.
requirements: Middleware is (ctx: T, next: () => Promise<void>) => Promise<void>
Works with any context type via generic

name: pubsub
description: In-process pub/sub with topics, wildcards, and backpressure.
requirements: Backpressure: drop or queue when handler is slow

name: command-bus
description: Command/handler pattern for decoupled command dispatch.
requirements: TypeScript: handler type inferred from command

name: query-builder
description: Type-safe SQL query builder (no DB connection required).
requirements: select(columns), from(table), where(condition), orderBy, limit, offset
insert(table, data) and update(table, data, where)
Parameterized queries only - no string injection

name: migration-runner
description: Run versioned migration files in order with rollback support.
requirements: rollback(migrationsDir, db, steps?) reverts last N
Migration files named {timestamp}_{name}.ts with up() and down()

name: lazy-init
description: Lazy initialization wrappers for expensive resources.
requirements: lazy(factory: () => T) -> { value: T } computed on first access
reset(lazy) clears cached value for re-init

name: cache-invalidator
description: Tag-based cache invalidation for grouped cache entries.
requirements: invalidate(tag) removes all entries with that tag
invalidateMany(tags[]) removes entries matching any tag

name: lock
description: Async mutex and semaphore for coordinating concurrent access.
requirements: Semaphore(n): acquire() blocks when all permits taken

name: rest-client
description: Minimal REST client with typed responses and error handling.
requirements: Configurable base URL and default headers

name: graphql-client
description: Lightweight GraphQL query executor over HTTP.
requirements: Typed response with data and errors fields
Handles network errors vs GraphQL errors separately

name: websocket-frame
description: WebSocket frame encoder and decoder per RFC 6455.
requirements: Supports text, binary, ping, pong, close opcodes
Pure TypeScript, no Node ws module

name: sse-parser
description: Server-Sent Events stream parser.
requirements: Emits SSEEvent objects: event, data, id, retry

name: cors-handler
description: CORS policy evaluator for server-side request validation.
requirements: buildHeaders(origin, method) returns response headers object

name: http-retry
description: HTTP fetch wrapper with exponential backoff retry.
requirements: fetchWithRetry(url, init, opts) retries on 5xx and network errors
Returns last response or throws after exhausting retries

name: query-string
description: URL query string encoder and decoder.
requirements: parse(search) returns typed object from query string

name: multipart-form
description: Build multipart/form-data bodies for file uploads.
requirements: MultipartForm class with append(name, value, filename?)

name: http-cache
description: In-memory HTTP response cache with ETags and max-age.
requirements: store(url, response, headers) caches by URL
get(url) returns cached entry or null

name: webhook-verifier
description: Verify HMAC signatures on incoming webhooks (GitHub, Stripe style).
requirements: verify(payload, signature, secret, algorithm?) returns boolean
Supports sha256 and sha1 prefix formats
parse(header) extracts algorithm and hex from 'sha256=xxx'

name: query-cache
description: SQL query result cache with TTL and tag-based invalidation.
requirements: set(key, result, ttl, tags[]) stores result
get(key) returns fresh result or null
invalidate(tag) evicts all entries with that tag

name: migration-state
description: Track and apply database migration state.
requirements: Migration: {id, name, up: string, down: string}
getPending(applied[]) returns unapplied migrations in order

name: schema-diff
description: Compute structural diff between two JSON schemas.
requirements: diff(schemaA, schemaB) returns added, removed, changed fields
Detects type changes, required changes, new/removed fields

name: seed-builder
description: Reproducible test data seed builder.
requirements: SeedBuilder with deterministic pseudo-random from seed string
int(min, max), float(min, max), string(len), bool(), pick(arr[])
reset() restores to initial seed state

name: record-diff
description: Compute field-level diff between two plain objects for audit logs.
requirements: diff(before, after) returns array of {field, from, to}
Handles nested objects with dot-path notation

name: bulk-insert
description: Batch rows into chunked bulk INSERT statements.
requirements: chunk(rows, size) splits rows into groups
toValues(rows, columns) returns values array for driver

name: row-mapper
description: Map database rows to typed objects with column aliasing.
requirements: map(row) converts snake_case columns to camelCase fields

name: cursor-paginator
description: Cursor-based pagination helper for sorted queries.
requirements: encode(cursor) encodes opaque base64 cursor from field values
buildWhere(cursor, direction) returns SQL WHERE fragment

name: upsert-builder
description: Build INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE statements.
requirements: upsert(table, rows, conflictColumns, updateColumns) returns {sql, params}
Handles partial upsert (only update subset of columns)
Validates that conflictColumns are in rows

name: jwt-decode
description: Decode and validate JWT tokens without a secret (structure only).
requirements: Zero dependencies, no verification (use jwt-verify for that)

name: jwt-sign
description: Sign and verify JWTs using HMAC-SHA256.
requirements: sign(payload, secret, expiresInSec?) returns JWT string
verify(token, secret) returns payload or throws
Handles exp, iat, nbf standard claims

name: oauth-state
description: Generate and validate OAuth 2.0 state parameters.
requirements: generate() returns random base64url state string
store(state, metadata) saves with TTL (10 min default)
consume(state) validates and removes, returns metadata or null

name: session-token
description: Secure session token generation and validation.
requirements: generate(len?) returns cryptographically random base64url token
hash(token) returns SHA-256 hex for DB storage
encode(id, token) packs session ID into token

name: csrf-token
description: CSRF token generation and double-submit cookie validation.
requirements: createHeader(token) returns header name and value

name: password-policy
description: Validate passwords against configurable security policies.

name: token-bucket-auth
description: Token bucket for per-user API rate limiting with auth context.

name: api-key
description: API key generation, hashing, and prefix-based lookup.

name: scopes
description: OAuth-style permission scope parser and validator.
requirements: parse(scopeString) returns string[] from space-delimited string

name: basic-auth
description: HTTP Basic Authentication header encoder and decoder.

name: tool-registry
description: Registry for LLM tool definitions with validation.

name: prompt-chain
description: Chain prompts sequentially, passing outputs as inputs.
requirements: run(initialInput) executes chain and returns final output

name: context-window
description: Manage LLM context window with token budget.
requirements: add(message) inserts if budget allows, evicts oldest if not
Simple whitespace tokenizer (1 token per ~4 chars)

name: token-budget
description: Track and enforce token budgets across LLM calls.
requirements: TokenBudget with total limit and per-call limit

name: conversation-history
description: Typed conversation history with role validation and truncation.
requirements: truncate(maxTokens, estimator?) trims oldest non-system messages

name: tool-call-parser
description: Parse LLM tool call responses from raw text.
requirements: parse(text) extracts tool calls from JSON blocks
parseMultiple(text) returns all tool calls in order
validate(call, schema) checks arguments against JSON schema

name: structured-output
description: Parse and validate LLM structured output (JSON mode).
requirements: extract(text) pulls JSON from markdown code blocks or raw text
parse<T>(text, schema) validates against JSON schema
repair(text) attempts to fix truncated JSON

name: agent-memory-window
description: Sliding window memory for agent conversation context.
requirements: AgentMemoryWindow with windowSize and summarize hook
add(turn) appends and evicts when full
getSummary() returns summary of evicted context

name: function-schema
description: Generate JSON Schema from TypeScript-style function signatures.
requirements: buildSchema(name, description, params) returns OpenAI function schema
validate(args, schema) checks args against schema

name: agent-scratchpad
description: Key-value scratchpad for agent working memory.
requirements: fromContext(text) parses back from string format

name: aria-label
description: Generate accessible ARIA labels from element context.
requirements: buttonLabel(text, icon?) combines text and icon context
inputLabel(name, type, required) builds form input label
listLabel(count, noun) builds 'N items' style label

name: color-contrast
description: WCAG 2.1 color contrast ratio calculator.
requirements: isAA(ratio, large?) checks WCAG AA threshold
isAAA(ratio, large?) checks WCAG AAA threshold
suggestAccessible(fg, bg) returns adjusted fg that passes AA

name: focus-trap
description: Focus trap logic for modal dialogs (DOM-free, index-based).
requirements: first() and last() return boundary indices

name: screen-reader-text
description: Generate screen-reader-friendly text alternatives.
requirements: describe(node) returns verbose description from node metadata

name: keyboard-nav
description: Keyboard navigation handler for lists and grids.
requirements: KeyboardNav with orientation: horizontal | vertical | grid
handleKey(event, currentIndex, itemCount) returns new index
gridNav(event, row, col, cols, rows) returns {row, col}

name: reduced-motion
description: Respect prefers-reduced-motion in animation configs.
requirements: reduced(config) returns zero-duration config if motion is reduced
withMotion(full, reduced) picks config based on preference

name: alt-text
description: Generate descriptive alt text for images from metadata.
requirements: altText(filename, context?) generates from filename heuristics
isDecorative(alt) returns true for empty or purely decorative alt
truncate(alt, maxLen) trims without cutting words

name: tab-order
description: Manage logical tab order for custom interactive components.

name: locale-parser
description: Parse and normalize BCP 47 locale strings.

name: date-locale
description: Locale-aware date formatting without Intl polyfills.
requirements: Patterns: YYYY, MM, DD, day name, month name
Short and long month/day names for en, fr, de, es, pt
relative(date, now, locale?) returns '3 days ago' style

name: plural-rules
description: Pluralization rules for major languages.
requirements: Implements CLDR plural rules for en, fr, de, es, pt, ru, ar, zh
selectForm(count, forms, locale) picks correct string from forms array

name: rtl-detect
description: Detect RTL text direction and apply bidi logic.
requirements: isRTL(locale) returns boolean for locale string
detectDirection(text) infers from Unicode bidi characters
wrapBidi(text, dir) wraps with Unicode bidi markers

name: currency-format
description: Format currency values by locale and currency code.
requirements: format(amount, currency, locale) returns formatted string
Handles major currencies: USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, BRL, etc.

name: number-format-locale
description: Locale-aware number formatting with grouping and decimal separators.
requirements: format(n, locale) uses correct decimal/group separator per locale
formatPercent(n, locale) appends % with locale rules

name: message-format
description: ICU MessageFormat-style string interpolation with plurals and selects.

name: transliterate
description: Transliterate non-Latin scripts to ASCII.
requirements: toASCII(text) transliterates common Unicode to Latin
Handles Cyrillic, Greek, Arabic, Hebrew basics
Used for URL slug generation and sorting

name: timezone-offset
description: Timezone offset utilities without full tz database.
requirements: stringToOffset(str) parses offset string to minutes

name: locale-sort
description: Locale-aware string sorting with collation order.
requirements: sort(items, locale?, key?) sorts array respecting locale rules

name: health-check
description: HTTP health check endpoint builder with structured status response.
requirements: run() executes all checks in parallel

name: metrics-collector
description: In-process metrics collector (counters, gauges, histograms).

name: log-aggregator
description: Aggregate structured log lines with level filtering and buffering.
requirements: flush() returns buffered entries and clears
filter(level) returns entries at or above level
toText(entries) formats as plain text lines

name: env-validator
description: Validate required environment variables at startup.
requirements: validate(schema, env) returns {ok, missing[], invalid[], values}
withDefaults(schema, env) returns env with defaults applied

name: feature-flag
description: Simple boolean feature flag store with overrides.
requirements: toJSON() returns current state for debugging

name: circuit-breaker
description: Circuit breaker pattern for external service calls.
requirements: getState() returns current state and stats

name: backoff
description: Configurable backoff strategies for retry delays.
requirements: exponential(attempt, base, max) returns ms delay
linear(attempt, step, max) returns ms delay

name: process-health
description: Monitor Node/Bun process health metrics.
requirements: memoryUsage() returns rss, heapUsed, heapTotal in MB
cpuUsage() returns user and system in ms
snapshot() returns all metrics at once

name: shutdown-handler
description: Graceful shutdown handler for process signals.
requirements: All handlers run in registration order

name: deploy-lock
description: Distributed deploy lock using filesystem or in-memory.
requirements: DeployLock with lockFile path and TTL
acquire() returns true if lock obtained

name: use-debounce
description: React hook for debouncing values and callbacks.
requirements: useDebouncedCallback(fn, delay) returns stable debounced fn

name: use-local-storage
description: React hook for synced localStorage state.
requirements: Syncs across tabs via storage event

name: use-async
description: React hook for managing async operations with loading/error state.
requirements: useAsync<T>(fn, deps) returns {data, loading, error, refresh}
Cancels previous call on dep change

name: use-interval
description: React hook for declarative setInterval with cleanup.

name: use-click-outside
description: React hook to detect clicks outside a referenced element.

name: use-media-query
description: React hook for responsive breakpoint detection.

name: use-previous
description: React hook to access the previous value of a variable.

name: use-toggle
description: React hook for boolean toggle state.

name: use-event-listener
description: React hook for adding and auto-cleaning event listeners.
requirements: useEventListener(target, event, handler, options?) attaches listener
Works on window, document, or any EventTarget

name: use-resize-observer
description: React hook wrapping ResizeObserver for element size tracking.

name: lazy-value
description: Lazily evaluated value with explicit initialization.
requirements: value property computes and caches on first access

name: request-dedup
description: Deduplicate in-flight async requests by cache key.
requirements: dedup<T>(key, fn) returns shared promise if key is in-flight
On resolution, all waiters receive same result
On rejection, all waiters receive same error
Configurable TTL for caching successful results

name: cache-headers
description: Parse and build HTTP cache control headers.
requirements: isStale(headers, age) checks if resource is stale

name: batch-queue
description: Coalesce multiple individual requests into batched calls.
requirements: Flushes on maxSize or maxWait timeout
batchFn receives items array and returns results array

name: idle-queue
description: Execute tasks during idle time (requestIdleCallback-inspired).

name: object-pool
description: Reusable object pool to reduce GC pressure.
requirements: acquire() gets instance from pool or creates new
release(obj) returns to pool after reset

name: fn-once-async
description: Ensure an async function is only called once, caching the result.
requirements: Concurrent calls wait for the first to complete
Returns cached result on subsequent calls

name: timed-cache
description: Cache with per-entry TTL and lazy eviction.
requirements: TimedCache<K, V>(defaultTTL) stores entries with expiry
get(key) returns value or undefined if expired
set(key, value, ttl?) overrides default TTL
has(key) returns true if present and not expired

name: frame-scheduler
description: Schedule work across animation frames (non-browser, timer-based).
requirements: schedule(fn) queues work for next frame

name: work-queue
description: Priority work queue with concurrency control.
requirements: WorkQueue with concurrency and priority levels (0-9)

name: input-sanitize
description: Strip dangerous characters from user-supplied input strings.
requirements: sanitize(input) removes control characters and null bytes

name: xss-escape
description: Escape HTML special characters for safe output in HTML contexts.
requirements: escapeAttr(str) safe for HTML attribute values
escapeCSS(str) safe for CSS string values
escapeURL(str) safe for URL parameter values

name: sql-escape
description: Escape values for SQL string interpolation (last-resort only).
requirements: escapeString(value) escapes single quotes by doubling
escapeIdentifier(name) wraps in double-quotes and escapes
warn(msg) logs to console that parameterized queries are preferred

name: csp-builder
description: Build Content-Security-Policy headers programmatically.
requirements: CSPBuilder with directive methods: defaultSrc, scriptSrc, etc.
nonce() generates a random nonce for inline scripts

name: path-traversal
description: Detect and block path traversal attacks in file paths.
requirements: isSafe(userPath, root) returns false if path escapes root
sanitize(userPath, root) returns resolved path or throws
detect(path) returns array of suspicious patterns found

name: redact
description: Redact sensitive fields from objects for logging.
requirements: redact(obj, keys[]) replaces matched keys with '[REDACTED]'
redactPattern(obj, regex) redacts keys matching pattern

name: nonce
description: Generate cryptographically secure nonces for CSP and tokens.
requirements: Used for script nonces and form tokens

name: entropy
description: Estimate entropy of a string for password strength analysis.
requirements: entropy(str) returns bits of entropy estimate
zxcvbn-lite(str) returns score 0-4 based on patterns

name: rate-limit-headers
description: Parse and build standard rate limit headers.
requirements: parse(headers) extracts limit, remaining, reset from RateLimit-* or X-RateLimit-* headers
build(limit, remaining, reset) returns headers object

name: secret-scan
description: Scan text for accidentally included secrets (API keys, tokens).
requirements: scan(text) returns array of {type, match, position}
Patterns: AWS keys, GitHub tokens, generic bearer tokens, private keys

name: csv-to-json
description: Convert CSV text to array of objects with header row support.
requirements: parse(csv) returns array of row objects
Headers from first row by default

name: json-to-csv
description: Convert array of objects to CSV string.
requirements: Quotes fields containing commas or newlines

name: xml-parse
description: Minimal XML parser for simple documents.

name: yaml-parse
description: Minimal YAML subset parser (scalars, sequences, mappings).
requirements: Supports string, number, boolean, null scalars
Handles quoted strings and multiline blocks (|)

name: ndjson
description: Newline-delimited JSON (NDJSON) encoder and decoder.
requirements: decode(text) returns array of parsed objects
stream(text, onRecord) calls callback per line

name: msgpack-lite

Supported types: uint8, uint16, uint32, int8, int16, int32, float32, float64

name: transform-pipeline
description: Composable sync and async data transformation pipeline.
requirements: Both accept initial value and return transformed result

name: flatten-tree

name: proto-encode

name: image-dimensions

requirements: detect(buffer) returns {width, height, format} or null
Supports PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP header parsing

name: dominant-color
description: Find dominant color in an image pixel array.
requirements: dominantColor(pixels: Uint8ClampedArray, width, height) returns {r, g, b}

name: exif-parse

Reads APP1 marker and IFD0 tags

name: svg-sanitize

Zero dependencies, regex-based (safe for simple SVGs)

name: audio-duration

requirements: Supports MP3 (CBR bitrate header), WAV (header), OGG (comment header)
Returns null if unable to determine

name: resize-calc

cover(srcW, srcH, targetW, targetH) returns scale factor
contain(srcW, srcH, targetW, targetH) returns scale factor

WebM: reads EBML Segment Duration element

nested: vars can be functions returning string

translate(tx, ty), rotate(angle), scale(sx, sy) factory methods

name: research-pipeline
description: 4-stage adversarial research pipeline - researcher finds sources, writer drafts, verifier checks URLs, reviewer audits adversarially
requirements: Export createResearchPipeline(topic) returning a pipeline orchestrator
4 stages: research (gather sources with URLs), write (draft from sources only), verify (fetch every URL, remove unverifiable claims), review (adversarial audit with FATAL/MAJOR/MINOR severity)
File-based intermediate state - each stage writes to disk, next stage reads files not inline content
Provenance tracking - record sources consulted, accepted, rejected per stage

name: research-provenance
description: Provenance sidecar generator - tracks sources consulted, accepted, rejected, and verification status for any research artifact
requirements: Export createProvenance(slug) returning a provenance tracker
Methods: addSource(url, status), addClaim(text, sourceUrl, verified), toMarkdown()
Track rounds of research, total sources found vs accepted vs rejected
Generate <slug>.provenance.md sidecar file alongside the research output

name: research-integrity
description: Research integrity validator - enforces URL-or-it-didnt-happen rules on any text claiming facts or citing sources
requirements: Export validateIntegrity(text) returning { valid: boolean, issues: IntegrityIssue[] }
Detect claims without URLs, fabricated-looking URLs, dead URL patterns, summary-without-source patterns
Severity levels: FATAL (fabricated source), MAJOR (claim without citation), MINOR (incomplete reference)
Export integrityRules as typed constants for use in agent system prompts
